title: Maniac uses custom hit outcomes instead of target AL

card.rawText: When this creature rolls to hit, ignore the target's AL. Use the following outcomes instead: 1-7: Critical Fail. 8-12: Critical Hit. 13+: Normal Hit. This card is unaffected by Hit Modifier increases.

effect.value: Ignore target AL; use custom outcome table

plan.title: Maniac uses custom hit outcomes instead of target AL
plan.summary: Battle Maniac and verify the custom hit outcome override route is represented when it rolls to hit.

notes: Maniac ignores target AL when rolling to hit.
Use 8-12 as a Critical Hit range per card text.

steps: Resolve hit roll using custom outcome table.
Verify hit outcome override route is visible.

expectedAssertions.label: Maniac hit outcome override route emitted evidence

manualVerification: Verify against card text: When this creature rolls to hit, ignore the target's AL. Use the following outcomes instead: 1-7: Critical Fail. 8-12: Critical Hit. 13+: Normal Hit. This card is unaffected by Hit Modifier increases.
riskNotes: This may expose missing custom hit-table runtime support.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_068_maniac-068-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
